name: Kashi Kugel
recipeIngredient: 2 large Apples, cut into large pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except topping in a large bowl until well blended.
2. Grease lightly a 1-quart casserole dish about 2 1/2 inches deep.
3. Pour the mixture into the prepared dish.
4. Sprinkle the topping evenly over the kugel.
5. Bake at 350°F for 45 minutes or until lightly firm.
6. Serve warm or at room temperature in the refrigerator.
